responses.2: Some I did commit that was already delt with, some I did not commit.
responses.3: "I was very unprofessional by calling him a pedo. The reason I said it was because he called me a retard, and he was telling other staff members to fuck off. I still should not have commented back; I should have just ignored it. At the end of the day, it was my own fault, and I own up to my mistakes. Then I was on duty as staff, and there were no reports for about 30 - 40 minutes, and I decided to be nice and went into the bar asking for a whiskey. At the time, I did not know I could not role-play as staff since I am new to the staff team, and he got extremely mad at me and called staff. So I waited for staff, and the staff member came. He said, 'You cannot role-play as staff,' and I said I did not know, my apologies. He started kicking off again, and the staff member said, 'Just go in note clip,' so I did, waiting for reports in note clip next to the person. I did not say anything; I was eating food, and he started calling me a dickhead and saying my father left. But in the clips, he cut half of the clips out that he had sent to the staff member. I have staff members who witnessed him calling me a retard and telling staff to fuck off and him being extremely toxic within the game. An hour goes by, and I saw him in staff waiting, and I dragged him to staff voice 1, asking, 'What do you need help with?' He starts screaming down the mic and starts making weird noises, so I disconnected him, and he joined staff waiting again. So I gave him one last chance to tell me what he needs help with, and he starts screaming, 'Why did you disconnect me?' I kept saying, 'Why do you need staff?' and he kept screaming the same thing over and over. Another staff member witnessed it, and I disconnected him, but he kept joining staff waiting, and I kept trying to disconnect him, but he kept joining back, so I just left him there. I was on duty as staff after this whole situation, and there was someone looking to role-play with someone, so I said, 'I'll role-play with you.' So I went into staff RTO and said, 'I'm going off duty, have a nice day.' I turned my headtag off, but I forgot to go off duty; that was my mistake. I spoke to Polo and apologized, and he gave me a strike and went on with my night, had a couple of role-play scenarios, and went offline. I woke up the next morning, and my staff roles were gone, and it said I have been blacklisted. I made a ticket asking why I was blacklisted, and the person who was trolling us the night before made a staff report on me and showed clipped videos of what happened. Many staff members know what happened, and I was extremely angry because I did not get a say or get to tell my side of the story. I had clips, but I have deleted them now, and I have many staff members who could have vouched for me. I got a bit angry and said something I should not have said, and I said, 'What happens if I nuke the Discord server?' That was unprofessional and pathetic of me. This ain't no excuse, but at the time, I was not having a good day because today I found out my grandfather has passed away, and this, dealing with that, was overwhelming for me. I would never nuke the Discord server because someone has dedicated hard work into this server, and I know how much work it is to run a FiveM server due to me having one for three years, and I sold it to a new person due to having things going on with my life. I hope you can forgive me, and I hope I can get my staff roles back because I was grinding hours and trying to help people out, and because I left a very high position in another server to join this server. I will drop the names of some of the staff members that witnessed this.  Staff Members: John H, Clayton, Jayden.S, Polo  The Member Trolling: Not Wallie
